creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
> I believe "-devel" is incorrect since 4.8.3 is release version, not a beta/alpha/pre-release/etc.

I can change version to 4.8.3.yyyymmdd and set to last commit.


> I'd suggest moving your patches to devel/ccache4

It is good for ccache4 :)


> adding major version is common practice in ports (e.g. llvm14, llvm15, gcc12, gcc13, etc)

These ports can be installed and used in parallel.
